name: embedding_create
description: Generate vector embeddings for text input, useful for semantic search, clustering, and similarity comparisons.

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Input text to embed, encoded as a string or array of strings.

parameters.name: encoding_format
parameters.description: The format of the embeddings: 'float' (default) or 'base64'.

parameters.name: dimensions
parameters.description: The number of dimensions for the output embeddings (supported by text-embedding-3 models).

body.input: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
